storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC004

## Production Intent
A montage sequence designed to visually communicate the transition of John Carter from an outsider to a skilled member of the Zodangan air-scout squadron. The sequence must emphasize the technical mastery of Martian aviation and the specific physics of eighth-ray propulsion technology through varied scales of coverage.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Zodangan Air-Scouts

## Required Environments
- Zodangan air-fields/training grounds

## Continuity Constraints
- The visual behavior of the eighth-ray propulsion (gravity repulsion effects) must remain consistent across all shots.

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter utilizes a ruse to integrate into the Zodangan air-scout squadron.
- BT002: Montage of intensive training in Martian aviation over several days.
- BT003: Technical mastery of eighth-ray propulsion mechanics and flight maneuvers.
